svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 23px; margin-left: 532px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 制約条件の 4 層構造 — 上位ほど交渉の余地がない

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 46px; margin-left: 532px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 法令 / 環境 が技術 / 組織 の選択肢を制限し、技術 / 組織 が要件の実現手段を制限する

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 123px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① 法令・コンプライアンス (CON-040〜049)
個人情報保護法 / J-SOX / データ主権 — 交渉不能

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 205px; margin-left: 123px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② 環境 (CON-050〜059)
オンプレ完結 / x86_64 / 閉域 / 社内プロキシ経由 — 物理・組織の実態

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 295px; margin-left: 123px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ ライセンス・予算・人員 (CON-020〜029 / CON-030〜039)
商用 OSS のみ / MVP-0 単独 / MVP-1 二名体制 — 経営合意で動かせる

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 123px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
④ 技術・言語 (CON-001〜019)
Kubernetes / CNCF 優先 / Go + Rust (tier1) / .NET Framework 共存 — 技術判断

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 475px; margin-left: 123px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ プロジェクト規約 (CON-060〜069)
drawio 図表 / 1 ファイル 300 行 / 日本語コメント / ADR — 運用で変えられる

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 295px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 上位制約が下位の選択肢を狭める

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(204, 204, 204), rgb(62, 62, 62));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 550px; margin-left: 532px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 例: 「データ主権 (①)」→「オンプレ完結 (②)」→「クラウド専用 OSS は対象外 (④)」→「Terraform ではなく OpenTofu (⑤)」の連鎖。
